name: topomari
description: TopoMari is a self-hosted Komari topology dashboard with authenticated private TCP probes and SQLite history.

scripts.check: node --check server.mjs && node --check lib/admin-session.mjs && node --check lib/komari-client.mjs && node --check lib/komari-geoip.mjs && node --check lib/health-status.mjs && node --check lib/security-policy.mjs && node --check lib/topology-config.mjs && node --check lib/topology-config-store.mjs && node --check lib/topology-service.mjs && node --check lib/probe-store.mjs && node --check lib/probe-ingest.mjs && node --check lib/agent-registry.mjs && node --check scripts/agent-token.mjs && node --check scripts/bootstrap-agents.mjs && node --check scripts/recover-agent-registry.mjs && node --check scripts/public-audit.mjs && node --check public/app.js && node --check public/admin.js && node --check public/editor.js && node --check public/sparkline.js && node --check public/frontend/api-client.js && node --check public/frontend/i18n.js && node --check public/frontend/preference-bootstrap.js && node --check public/frontend/preferences.js && node --check public/frontend/route-globe.js && node --check public/frontend/site-theme.js && node --check public/frontend/theme-background.js && node --check public/frontend/solar-theme.js && python3 -c "compile(open('public/agent/probe_agent.py', encoding='utf-8').read(), 'probe_agent.py', 'exec')" && bash -n public/agent/install.sh && bash -n public/agent/update.sh && bash -n public/agent/uninstall.sh && bash -n scripts/install-dashboard-service.sh && bash -n scripts/update-dashboard.sh && bash -n scripts/uninstall-dashboard.sh
